Wu Yan (‰ºçÂª∂). General of the Flying Cavalry, fled when his position was untenable. Du Yu executed him. Wu Yan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Wu Yan lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
